tables.name: Table 1
tables.description: Baseline characteristics of patients (age, eligibility, PSA, metastatic risk group, site of metastases) for SOC-alone, SOC+AAP, and all patients.

tables.name: Table 2
tables.description: Primary and secondary outcome measures (overall survival, failure-free survival, progression-free survival, metastatic PFS, skeletal-related events, disease-specific survival) comparing SOC-alone and SOC+AAP groups.

tables.name: Table 3
tables.description: Primary and secondary outcomes, stratified by metastatic disease risk group (low-risk, high-risk, unclassified) for SOC-alone and SOC+AAP groups.

tables.name: Table 4
tables.description: Combined analyses of results from STAMPEDE and LATITUDE trials, including patient numbers, control/research groups, and hazard ratios.

figures.name: Figure 2
figures.description: Kaplan-Meier survival curves for overall survival and failure-free survival

figures.name: Figure 3
figures.description: Kaplan-Meier survival curves for overall survival by metastatic disease risk group
